calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Paga Action
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Gayane Ghandilyan Esq. 310-438-5555 Bibiyan Law Group for Plaintiff.
Zain Zubair Esq. 310-552-5548 K & L Gates for Defendant.
Court reporter: David Salyer, CSR #4410, 323-497-1441, davesal55@gmail.com

Hearing is held.
The Court poses questions and sequence of events.
Ms. Ghandilyan presents arguments.
Mr. Zubair responds and presents arguments; Jackson PAGA action filed first, nucleus identical, substantial overlap, labor code violations.
The Court poses further questions on the Jackson PAGA action and Burton class action re staying case, significance, overlap, labor codes.
Counselors respond.

After full argument, the Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANTs BRIDGE HOUSING CORPORATION, and BRIDGE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT COMPANY's Motion To Stay Paga Action.

Taken Under Submission

(as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

Judge: John M. True, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court reporter: David Salyer, CSR #4410, 323-497-1441, davesal55@gmail.com, Reported. (302/JMT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-14-2025 Set For Trial On Jan-25-27 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
